examples: A rotund, smiling, red-faced gentleman appeared.
After 16 weeks of eating as much as they wanted and lolling around in their cages, all were rotund.
Already, America's most rotund citizens benefit from bypass surgery and cholesterol-lowering statins.
He is a rotund man, perhaps a bit overweight, who smiles from behind steamy glasses.
But Sunderland, prompted by the impressive if slightly rotund Andy Reid in midfield, started to settle.
